text: & Authentic Eats in Lahore Post author By Karl Rock Post date December 28, 2021 4 Comments on The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore Lahore is like a great mix of Amritsar and Delhi. It’s very easy to love. Besides being a fashion hub, it’s also a foodie hub where you’ll find the best of Punjabi & Pakistani food.My favourite places to eat in Lahore First, here’s my review of the oldest food street in Lahore – Gawalmandi. You should visit this street at night.Asad Meher Restaurant & BBQ (Mini

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: in Lahore – Gawalmandi. You should visit this street at night.Asad Meher Restaurant & BBQ (Mini Market)Asad Meher Restaurant comes alive at lunchtime! It’s jam-packed with locals, which is a great sign!I spotted Asad Meher Restaurant from the street near my hotel. Smoke from the barbeque was pouring out, and it was packed with locals eating. I scanned the offerings and decided this looked like a great place to eat.A packed restaurant is always a good sign!Next, I sat down next to a young man.

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: great place to eat.A packed restaurant is always a good sign!Next, I sat down next to a young man. It was his first day on the job at the nearby OLX office. He spoke English, and we had a great meal of Saag Chicken (spinach & chicken) and Daal Channa (lentils & chickpeas).Daal Chana (Lentils & Chickpeas)ChaiPlain NaanA perfect lunch, in my opinion!At the end of the meal, he wouldn’t let me pay! I wish he would because I’d have loved to treat him.Rogni NaanChole (Chickpeas)This is my breakfast

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: I wish he would because I’d have loved to treat him.Rogni NaanChole (Chickpeas)This is my breakfast there every day.Aloo ParathaHalwa PuriTheir Aloo Paratha is also delicious! The spices and potato are perfectly balanced.The menu at Asad Meher, sorry, it’s in Urdu!Visit for a traditional Punjabi Dhaba (roadside restaurant) experience!Quetta Millat Cafe (Liberty)A great little Quetta style restaurant in Liberty.I was going to go to Capri Restaurant but they weren’t serving what I wanted at the

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: in Liberty.I was going to go to Capri Restaurant but they weren’t serving what I wanted at the time as the menu changes throughout breakfast/lunch/dinner. So I went next door to Quetta Millat Cafe and was pleasantly surprised.Quetta Millat Cafe is your standard dhaba. Chai. Paratha. Eggs. And most of the time that’s all I want! I also met Arshad from Hunza Valley there who paid for my entire meal. Thanks, Arshad!I sat down next to Arshad at Quetta Millat Cafe and it turned out he was in the

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: Thanks, Arshad!I sat down next to Arshad at Quetta Millat Cafe and it turned out he was in the travel industry so he knew me.Rina’s Kitchenette (Gulberg)Club Sandwich Rs. 950Chocolate Shake Rs. 500Outdoor settingRina’s Kitchenette is a beautiful place to eat.Rina’s Kitchenette is the best cafe I ate at in Pakistan. They serve large portions of delicious western comfort foods. Their setting is upmarket and great for outdoor dining with a group of friends. This is a western restaurant done

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: is upmarket and great for outdoor dining with a group of friends. This is a western restaurant done right.Do try their club sandwich, super thick chocolate shake, and Rina’s buttermilk fried chicken sandwich Rs. 990. You can’t go wrong with whatever you order at Rina’s!Capri Restaurant (Liberty)The scene at Capri Restaurant at 8 am. Go for breakfast; they open from 6 am.I was looking for a COVID-19 test early one morning, but I found Capri Restaurant instead.What I liked was watching the chefs

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: test early one morning, but I found Capri Restaurant instead.What I liked was watching the chefs frying up fresh Halwa Puri and seeing the chaiwala boiling the tea. It was very authentic. So I decided to stop for breakfast.Try the famous Halwa and Meetha Pura here. Hawla is a sweet semolina dish served with fried puri (bread) Rs. 150. Then have a Meetha Pura Rs. 80, like a fried pancake. Wash it down with Chai Rs. 60. Unhealthy, but absolutely delicious.Ghulam Rasool Chanay Wala

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: Wash it down with Chai Rs. 60. Unhealthy, but absolutely delicious.Ghulam Rasool Chanay Wala (Anarkali)Locals say Ghulam Rasool Chanay Wala is the best in Lahore.Ghulam Rasool Chanay Wala is one of Lahore’s oldest chickpeas stores – it’s been running since 1948! They serve chickpeas with either mutton Rs. 530, egg Rs. 20, or mutton meatballs (called koftas) Rs. 50. A plane plate of chickpeas costs Rs. 80. And naan Rs. 15.As an entree you’re served a glass of Yakni Rs. 40 which is a meat soup

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: Rs. 80. And naan Rs. 15.As an entree you’re served a glass of Yakni Rs. 40 which is a meat soup broth. For dessert, Gulab Jamun is available, as well as chai.Mutton Channe Rs. 530Eggs Rs. 20 each, Mutton Kofta Rs. 50 eachNaan Rs. 15 eachYakni Rs. 40Outside Ghulam RasoolGhulam Rasool is inside this alleyMenuHere’s a translation of Ghulam Rasool Chanay Wale’s menu that I did for my Instagram followers.Haaji Dera Restaurant (Gulberg 2)This man has a small restaurant serving samosas and pakoras.I

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: Dera Restaurant (Gulberg 2)This man has a small restaurant serving samosas and pakoras.I was walking around hungry when I found Haaji Dera. It’s a small street stall where the owner is busy frying samosa, pakora, and jalebi all day long.Chef frying food at Haaji Dera Restaurant.For Rs. 80 you’ll get a large samosa, pakore, salad, sweet chutney, and chickpeas! It’s enough for lunch.Pakore (fried vegetables)My Rs. 80 plate.Massive JalebiPakore is being fried.A view from the outdoor seating.Karak

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: Rs. 80 plate.Massive JalebiPakore is being fried.A view from the outdoor seating.Karak Khel (Bankers Town)Karak Khel is by far the prettiest restaurant with the best outdoor dining experience on this list. I’m not much into that scene, because the food is usually underwhelming. And the food at Karak Khel isn’t amazing, but I’m sure tourists would enjoy this place regardless.Contra (Mini Market)If you want to sit, drink some good coffee and eat some good cake, then Contra is a great place. You

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: you want to sit, drink some good coffee and eat some good cake, then Contra is a great place. You can go during the day with your laptop and get some work done too.Fort View Hotel & Restaurant (Fort)Zack and I went to Fort View Hotel & Restaurant at night for dinner.If you want the best view in Lahore, Fort View Hotel & Restaurant has it! You can see 3 massive attractions from their roof-top dining: Badshahi Mosque, Lahore Fort, and Minar-e-Pakistan. The food was fantastic too!Here’s the view

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: Badshahi Mosque, Lahore Fort, and Minar-e-Pakistan. The food was fantastic too!Here’s the view from the rooftop; it’s spectacular.There are two things you need to order here: Balochi Sajji which is lightly spiced and slow-cooked barbeque chicken with rice, and also Chicken Karahi which is served in the dish that it’s cooked in.Balochi SajjiDaalChicken KarahiWaffles by Alamgir Ali (Gulberg Main Market)Waffles by Alamgir Ali started off as a street cart and now he has his own shop! They serve

metadata.title: The Best Cheap & Authentic Eats in Lahore - Karl Rock's Blog

text: Market)Waffles by Alamgir Ali started off as a street cart and now he has his own shop! They serve waffle cone ice creams and milkshakes at very reasonable prices.Special waffle cone Rs. 120MenuIce Land Juice & Dry Fruits (MM Alam Road)Chocolate shakeIf you’re craving a fresh shake or juice, Ice Land delivers. There you’ll find all sorts of unique flavours popular in Pakistan, but also traditional favourites too.If this post helped you, please leave a comment. Tags Cheap Eats, Lahore, Pakistan,
